description_long: This is a modern house surrounded by a dense ring of mature trees, creating a secluded and private environment. The house features a flat roof with visible skylights and a combination of white and reddish-brown exterior wall panels. The structure is rectangular with clean, straight lines and large windows, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and contemporary design. The property sits on a grassy plot, with the trees forming a natural barrier around the house. The entryway is partially visible, marked by a simple, flat-roofed overhang and a prominent door. The overall setting evokes a sense of tranquility and integration with nature, ideal for a suburban or park-adjacent neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house encircled by dense trees, featuring large windows and a mix of white and reddish-brown exterior panels. The secluded setting emphasizes privacy and contemporary design.
description_view_0: The house is seen from above, centered within a thick ring of trees, with the flat roof and skylights clearly visible.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the reddish-brown wall panels and the dense tree coverage, with the house partially obscured by foliage.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is visible, showing more of the flat roof and the rectangular structure, with the trees forming a near-complete circle.
description_view_3: The front entryway is partially visible, with the door and overhang peeking through the trees, emphasizing the secluded entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryway with a flat overhang, prominent door, and minimal decorative elements, partially obscured by trees
